calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-01-2020 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents (Set One); Decl. Of Jennifer A. Stewart In Support
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SULLIVAN COUNTER TOPS, INC., and STACEY STEELE'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents (Set One).

Defendant Sullivan Counter Tops, Inc.'s motion is unopposed and is granted. Plaintiff to serve verified responses without objections to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One) and Requests for Production of Documents (Set One) with Documents no later than January 27, 2020.
Defendant Sullivan Counter Tops, Inc's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $1140.00. Plaintiff to serve a check in the amount of $1140.00 made payable to the Client Trust Account of Rankin, Shuey, Ranucci, Mintz, Lampasona & Reynolds no later than Monday, January 27, 2020.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling via email to klgallo@discoveryreferee.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions; Memorandum In Support; And Decl. Of Jennifer A. Stewart
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SULLIVAN COUNTER TOPS, INC., and STACEY STEELE'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions.

Defendant Sullivan Counter Tops, Inc.'s motions for Requests for Admissions (Set One) and Requests for Admissions (Set Two) be admitted is unopposed and is granted.
Defendant Sullivan Counter Tops, Inc's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $760.00. Plaintiff to serve a check in the amount of $760.00 made payable to the Client Trust Account of Rankin, Shuey, Ranucci, Mintz, Lampasona & Reynolds no later than Monday, January 27, 2020.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling via email to klgallo@discoveryreferee.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
